name: Malleus Draconia and Sebek Zigvolt || Breeding
description:
[ Twisted Wonderland ] Malleus is your husband and you two wish for a child, too bad he’s infertile. Luckily, his most loyal knight Sebek can help with that.

For my own sick pleasure, personally I made us a poly couple, but u can go any route!
creator: Raccoochie
